prompt: A single piece of deep red silk fabric caught mid-air by wind, billowing against a stark monochromatic grey-white background. Fully saturated crimson red against muted grey. The fabric forms a dynamic sweeping arc shape. A few scattered autumn leaves in the air around it. Painterly composition. Bold, theatrical, simple, 16:9, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: high detail, bold shapes, small-size readability
